seo.title: Les Villas Ahlam — Private residential estate in Bouskoura
seo.description: Les Villas Ahlam · Where your dreams take root. 42 R+1 villa lots in a secure private estate in Bouskoura, from 4,500 MAD/m².

hero.imageAlt: Contemporary R+1 villa of the Les Villas Ahlam estate in Bouskoura at sunset
hero.intro: Les Villas Ahlam — <1>أحلام</1> — is a private residential estate of 42 R+1 villas, fifteen minutes from Mohammed V airport, designed for family peace of mind.

manifesto.paragraph1: Ahlam means <1>“dreams”</1> in Arabic. Within a secure, private estate, each lot is the space of a life to imagine — a contemporary villa, bright and timeless.
manifesto.paragraph2: An authorised and titled project (Land Title 23025/63, architect Badik Meriem), at the heart of a booming residential district south of Casablanca. Trust first.

items.title: Secure private estate
items.text: A gated, guarded estate along a 30 m road, for the peace of mind of families.

items.title: R+1 architecture
items.text: Contemporary villas to build, bright and timeless, on 200 to 461 m² of land.

items.title: Strategic address
items.text: 15 min from Mohammed V airport, close to Casablanca, the golf course and the Bouskoura forest.

quote.imageAlt: Bright living room of a contemporary villa at the Les Villas Ahlam estate
